stemHtml:
Which of the following statements is an interpretation of the METAR?

25020G38KT 1200 +TSGR BKN006 BKN015CB 23/18 Q1016 BECMG NSW=

options.a: Wind 250°, thunderstorm with moderate hail, QNH 1016 hPa.
options.b: Broken, cloud base 600 feet and 1 500 feet, temperature 18°C.
options.c: Mean wind speed 20-38 knots, meteorological visibility 1 200 metres, temperature 23°C.
options.d: Gusts of 38 knots, heavy thunderstorm with hail, dew point 18°C
